programmes.show_description: Edge of Madness. Two survivalists take on the hot and hellish conditions of Guyana's equatorial savannah. Slammed from day one by the heat, they battle against declining health. S2, Ep1
Rumble in the Jungle. Christina and Steve take on the Mexican jungles of Quintana Roo. With each sleepless bug-filled night, tensions rise - will they cope with each other? S2, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Pickle Mansion. The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. S6, Ep4
Mine Master's House. The team travel to Pennsylvania to reclaim items from an old mine master's house. They are surprised to find much of the house picked over before they arrive. S6, Ep5
Cracked. Kris' scheme to make a fortune on Shawn's Bluff find is sabotaged. Zeke may have found his mining future - until the ice breaks up and he has to move. S6, Ep15
Never Say Die. Shawn must fix his landlocked barge, but faulty controls threaten the Megadredge dream. And with limited dredging supplies, Emily gambles in the hope of a fast payoff. S6, Ep16
The Gold Gypsies make a discovery that could finally catapult their season. Meanwhile, the Victoria Diggers hit red tape, pushing Neville to the edge. S5, Ep4
The Legendary Cape Lion. Forrest returns to his childhood home in Zimbabwe searching for the extinct Cape lion after numerous sightings of a similar size lion with a black mane. S2, Ep3
Vital Sounds. The crew of the Wizard face a life-or-death situation when a deckhand collapses. On the Seabrooke, Scott is determined to win the captain's wager - but at what cost? S8, Ep6
I Don't Wanna Die. In a rush to help their collapsed greenhorn, the Wizard crew calls in a Coast Guard helicopter, and the remaining fleet race to haul crab ahead of the hurricane. S8, Ep7
Big Risk Big Reward. John's plans are derailed when a tree crushes his shelter. Ben finds the best dig site he's ever seen and Boyce's only shot at gold leaves him with dire options. S1, Ep4
Mystery Of Dead Mountain. In Siberia, Josh Gates investigates the strange and brutal cold case of the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine Soviet hikers died suspiciously in 1959. S6, Ep1
Siberia's Coldest Case. Josh Gates faces harsh conditions whilst investigating the Dyatlov Pass Incident, where nine hikers died in unexplained circumstances. S6, Ep18
Paradise In Peril. In Hawaii, the Raneys rescue a young family with a crumbling cabin on a homestead infested by slugs carrying a brain-eating parasite. S4, Ep5
The Lucky Day. Sweltering temperatures and a waterlogged mine threaten to unravel The Digi Diggers' season-long dream. The Cheals' starter motor fails on their wash plant. S6, Ep20
New Terra. The Bushmen put their lives on the line in the most dangerous mine they have ever worked. Plus, the Cheal's first dig of the season grinds to a halt. S7, Ep1
Battle Lines. When Sig rejects Jake's partnership offer, it sparks an intense feud between the pair. Plus, Josh Harris works hard to prove himself as captain of his father's boat. S14, Ep1
Pontoon Boat Cabin. The crew helps Jedi turn a pontoon boat into a 'cabinboat,' complete with a deck, bathroom and bedroom. This floating build is packed with surprises. S15, Ep7
Small Town, Big Dreams. In West Virginia, the crew play a big part of a small town's post-flood revival as they build a log cabin and timber frame. S15, Ep7
The Gold Timers negotiate a lucrative deal to sell their mining rights. Torrential summer storms in Victoria threaten to shut down the Poseidon Crew's operation. S7, Ep18
Hell or High Water. A pair of complete strangers find themselves stranded in and quite literally exposed to one of the world's most extreme weather environments. S2, Ep3
Redemption Road. AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. S2, Ep4
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Teleshopping.
Free Will House. The Salvage Dawg team travels to Free Will House in Huntington, West Virginia. They salvage a bathtub, sitz bath and kitchen cabinets. S6, Ep6
Rural Retreat Historical Society. Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society. While Robert salvages a vault door, Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop. S6, Ep7
Fight And Flight. Shawn tries to convince potential investors on his Megadredge vision. Kris frays Andy's nerves and Zeke releases a secret weapon, but faces a sudden challenge. S6, Ep17
Last Man Diving. To fund the Megadredge, Shawn races to the Bluff with only a day left in the season. Kris hits the best gold of his life, but his shoddy gear lets him down. S6, Ep18
The Poseidon Crew receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a quartz reef. Shane and Russell strike gold. S5, Ep5
Rio Apaporis Caiman. Forrest travels to rural Columbia trekking into the lawless bush in search of a unique crocodilian species, the Rio Apaporis caiman. S2, Ep4
The Aftermath. A treacherous arctic hurricane decimates the crab grounds, forcing captains Elliot Neese and Scott Campbell Jr to face some of their toughest decisions yet. S8, Ep8
Dead Men Get No Gold. Ben's season may be saved with a kill, but gold proves elusive. John finds a promising dig site but his stamina is fading. Boyce must move 500lbs of gear. S1, Ep5
The Search For Florida's Lost Pirate. Josh heads to Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of pirate Jose Gaspar. He joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters in the search. S6, Ep2
Chasing The Snake Kings. After a potential new breakthrough, Josh returns to Guatemala, searching for a snake king tomb. Using new technology, he hopes to find the tomb's location. S6, Ep3
Tropic Thunder. The Raneys rescue a family descended from rock'n'roll royalty by reclaiming their homestead from the jungle on Kauai. But a dangerous flash flood causes issues. S4, Ep6
Between A Rod And A Hard Place. A rookie miner gets trapped down a mine shaft. A dust storm forces the Blacklights to reluctantly return to the failed Land of Promise money pit. S7, Ep2
Ratter Brained. After ratter thieves raid their mine, the Misfits, Angel and rookie miner, Cody, struggle to find an opal king stone to fulfil an order for a buyer. S7, Ep3
First Blood. Jake becomes suspicious of Captain Keith's true intentions when he offers to take him on as an apprentice. Plus, Sig plots his revenge against his newest rival, Jake. S14, Ep2
Dead In The Water. Sean and Casey forge an alliance but when one strikes crab, will he betray it? Plus, will Wild Bill's risky new bait and fishing strategy pay off big? S14, Ep3
Ghosts In The Canal. Josh wants to investigate ghostly sightings and terrifying sounds coming from an abandoned canal along the Potomac. What will they uncover? S2, Ep13
Lost City Of El Mirador. Josh concludes his investigation into the mysterious Maya city of El Mirador, including the possible burial of the Snake Kings. S4, Ep13
In the Pilbara region, the Ferals hit a run of nuggets that could transform their season. Meanwhile, the Gold Retrievers are rocked by a medical emergency. S7, Ep19
